items.title: ESLint v10: Flat Config Completion and JSX Tracking
items.summaryShort: ESLint v10: Flat Config Completion and JSX Tracking. ESLint version 10 has removed the legacy eslintrc configuration system, finalizing a long transition to flat config.

items.title: Pinterest Deploys Production-Scale Model Context Protocol Ecosystem for AI Agent Workflows
items.summaryShort: Pinterest Deploys Production-Scale Model Context Protocol Ecosystem for AI Agent Workflows. Pinterest engineering teams have deployed a production-ready Model Context Protocol (MCP) ecosystem that allows AI agents to automate complex engine

items.title: Presentation: The Principal Engineer’s Path: Skills, Strategies, and Lessons Learned
items.summaryShort: Presentation: The Principal Engineer’s Path: Skills, Strategies, and Lessons Learned. Sophie Weston explains that technical careers are winding journeys, not straight ladders.

items.title: Cloudflare Launches Dynamic Workers Open Beta: Isolate-Based Sandboxing for AI Agent Code Execution
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Launches Dynamic Workers Open Beta: Isolate-Based Sandboxing for AI Agent Code Execution. Cloudflare has released Dynamic Worker Loader into open beta, offering V8 isolate-based sandboxing for AI-generated code execution.

items.title: PyPI Supply Chain Attack Compromises LiteLLM, Enabling the Exfiltration of Sensitive Information
items.summaryShort: PyPI Supply Chain Attack Compromises LiteLLM, Enabling the Exfiltration of Sensitive Information. Discovered by FutureSearch researcher Callum McMahon, a supply chain attack against LiteLLM on PyPI resulted in over 40 thousand downloads of

items.title: De-fi platform Drift suspends deposits and withdrawals after millions in crypto stolen in hack
items.summaryShort: De-fi platform Drift suspends deposits and withdrawals after millions in crypto stolen in hack. Blockchain trackers put the cryptocurrency heist in the hundreds of millions of dollars and is already on track to be the largest crypto theft i

items.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
items.summaryShort: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident. Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

items.title: The reputation of troubled YC startup Delve has gotten even worse
items.summaryShort: The reputation of troubled YC startup Delve has gotten even worse. Delve faces new allegations that it violated the open source license of its customer, Sim.ai, by taking the customers's tool and passing it off as its own.
